🏥 Clinic Info (used in PO messages)
✅ No API Setup Needed!
This system uses wa.me links — the simplest WhatsApp integration:

1️⃣ Click "Send PO via WhatsApp" on any order
2️⃣ Message is pre-filled automatically
3️⃣ WhatsApp opens on your phone
4️⃣ Tap Send ▶ — done!

No tokens · No approval · No server · 100% free
